# **\[Lead 1 \- FACT\]** {#[lead-1---fact]}

## \[Hook \- Truth\] {#[hook---truth]}

If you want to hit fairway after fairway, *on command*... 

And gain 15 to 25 yards off the tee... 

Then, as shocking as this may sound... 

You need to STOP aiming at your target...

And STOP trying to hit the ball straight. 

Because you’re about to discover why even Tiger said, “the hardest shot to hit... is a straight shot…” 

Why having a predictable, controlled ball flight is the most important aspect of golf... 

And why — what I’m about to show you is the ONLY simple, reliable system… to make your accuracy off the tee *automatically* more consistent…

So you flush shot after shot perfectly ON-TARGET…  

Without worrying about hitting the ball straight — ever again. 

## \[Big Promise \+ Tease Unique Mechanism\] {#[big-promise-+-tease-unique-mechanism]}

Because you and I both know…

If you could just hit your target more often…

All your struggles as a golfer would disappear. 

No more nervous jitters on the first tee…

\[Show a golfer slicing a tee shot while the rest of the group watches\]

No more duck hooks or banana slices that fly out of bounds… 

And no more penalty strokes that cause blow up holes and ruin your entire round. 

## \[Address Biggest Objection\] {#[address-biggest-objection]}

Martin Chuck here…

And if you’re anything like the 50,000 amateurs I’ve worked with over the last 35 years…

You’ve probably spent years… maybe decades… working to become a more accurate player.

Trying things like tweaking your takeaway… 

Adjusting your alignment… 

Swinging slower... 

And even manipulating your clubface from setup to impact.

The problem is… 

All these adjustments give you NO margin for error.

And that’s why even if you hit thousands of balls working on these elements of your swing…

## \[Why Nothing Works\]  {#[why-nothing-works]}

It will only work for a few shots… 

A couple rounds… 

Or maybe a month.

But then, as soon as you think your swing is becoming more automatic… your two-way miss comes back to haunt you. 

## \[Tease Real Root Cause\]  {#[tease-real-root-cause]}

And that’s because you’re NOT fixing the root cause of your accuracy issues…

Which all comes down to the matchup between where you aim your club at setup... 

And YOUR natural swing path. 

But the second you begin using what I call the “Accuracy Window”... 

You’ll see just how easy it is to sync up your swing path and clubface... to hit predictable, on-target tee shots… that find 12 or more fairways every round…

Even when the pressure’s on. 

## \[Credibility\] {#[credibility]}

I spent decades working with professional players…. And even Major winners like Darren Clarke and Mike Weir...

As well as carefully analyzing Trackman data from tens of thousands of amateurs.

So now it ONLY takes minutes to get YOUR swing in the Accuracy Window.

This guarantees your uncontrollable ball flight… 

Gets turned into beautifully shaped shots... 

That fly up to 25 yards further — and directly on target.  

## \[Tease Mechanism\]

Because this “Accuracy Window” accounts for the natural deviations every player has in their swing.

## \[Proof\] {#[proof]}

I’ve even tested and proven this in over 1,000 live golf academies with high-handicappers who struggle with every swing flaw you can think of…

\[B-roll of Martin’s golf schools… with a couple quick before an afters showing their ball flight is now straighter and in the fairway\]

And EVERYONE who’s ever used it… eliminates at least 30 yards of dispersion off the tee… and instantly hits more fairways…

Just like this… 

\[Martin Pause\]

## \[Testimonial PROOF CLIP\]  {#[testimonial-proof-clip]}

## 

\[AA-VSL-01: Show a quick before and after clip of a golfer. His before shots can be a 2 way miss, then show him flushing multiple draws in a row. 

Testimonial: *“Before working with Martin I had a pretty big two-way miss, and my shots were all over the place. But now, my dispersion pattern was much tighter, and I hit 10 draws in a row\!”* 

NOTE: If we can let’s also show a dispersion chart before and after. The “before” chart showing balls scattered all over the course. The “after” showing his shots tightly placed near the target line.\] 

Bottom line is…

Once you see how easy it is to swing within the Accuracy Window… 

You’ll realize that to hit consistently accurate shots, you don’t need to be as naturally gifted as the top guys on tour… 

You don’t have to swing slower or sacrifice any distance… 

And you won’t get frustrated…

Thinking you're making progress… only to step out on the course and end up right back where you started — NEVER shooting the lower scores you know you’re capable of. 

I know how painful that is… 

And it’s my mission to make sure that NEVER happens to you again. 

## \[Future Pace\] {#[future-pace]}

So even if you're brand new to the game...

Or you’ve been playing for 10, 20, or even 30 years…

And even if you’ve NEVER felt in control of your tee shots before... 

With what I’m about to show you… 

The very next time you’re playing with low handicappers… 

Or find yourself on challenging holes with narrow fairways, massive doglegs, or OB hazards to the left AND right… 

\[AA-VSL-02: Flash quick b-roll / images of intimidating holes w/ narrow fairways, or hazard to the left and right.   
EX: [https://www.stadiumtalk.com/s/best-golf-courses-by-state-d17e466ef95f447d](https://www.stadiumtalk.com/s/best-golf-courses-by-state-d17e466ef95f447d)  
EX: [http://harriskalinka.com/blog/worlds-narrowest-fairway/](http://harriskalinka.com/blog/worlds-narrowest-fairway/)  
EX: Cypress Point: [https://blog.hole19golf.com/8-hardest-holes-in-golf/](https://blog.hole19golf.com/8-hardest-holes-in-golf/)\]

You’re going to have the reliable skill and confidence to pick your spot on the fairway…

…swing at full speed… 

And watch with satisfaction as your ball lands right where you want it.

# **\[Lead 2 \- Curiosity \- Accuracy Window\]** {#[lead-2---curiosity---accuracy-window]}

## **\[Intro 1\]** {#[intro-1]}

## \[Curiosity\] {#[curiosity]}

If you’re not swinging your club within THIS Accuracy Window right now…

![][image1]  
   
\[AA-VSL-03: Show intriguing image of the "Accuracy Window" above to build curiosity... and a golfer swinging his club through the window. Could also show a censored "mystery window". Blacked out with "?"\]

You’ll miss your target consistently…

And NEVER play good golf. 

Because we all know…

## **\[Intro 2\]** {#[intro-2]}

## \[Curiosity \+ Contrarian\] {#[curiosity-+-contrarian]}

See this? 

That’s an “Accuracy Window”... 

And it’s THE key to hitting fairway after fairway, on command. 

\[AA-VSL-03: Show intriguing image of the "Accuracy Window" above to build curiosity... and a golfer swinging his club through the window. Could also show a censored "mystery window". Blacked out with "?"\]

Yet most players don’t even know it exists... 

But what I’m sure you do know is... 

## **\[Intro 3 \- 2 versions\]** {#[intro-3---2-versions]}

## \[Curiosity \+ Truth\] {#[curiosity-+-truth]}

Here’s a fact: 

If you’re aiming straight at your target...

And NOT getting your clubface in THIS Accuracy Window at impact... 

\[In the ver sion with the test line included, use:  
AA-VSL-03: Show intriguing image of the "Accuracy Window" above to build curiosity... and a golfer swinging his club through the window. Could also show a censored "mystery window". Blacked out with "?"\]

You’ll NEVER hit fairways consistently.

And as you know… 

## **\[ALL INTROS PICK UP HERE\]** {#[all-intros-pick-up-here]}

## \[Big Idea\] {#[big-idea]}

Accuracy is EVERYTHING in golf. 

It keeps you on the fairway... dials in your consistency... and shaves strokes from your scorecard — more than any other aspect of the game.

## \[Big Promise \+ Tease Unique Mechanism\] {#[big-promise-+-tease-unique-mechanism]-1}

That’s why, right now, I’m about to show you the ONLY simple, reliable system… to make your accuracy off the tee *automatically* more consistent…

So you flush shot after shot perfectly ON-TARGET…  

Without ever worrying about hitting the ball straight — ever again.   
    
See, even Tiger says, “the hardest shot to hit is a straight shot…”

And if you’re trying to hit the ball straight every time you step up to the tee… 

You’re about to discover why this is the root cause of ALL your struggles with your driver…

Because it gives you ZERO margin for error.

## \[Credibility \+ Benefits\] {#[credibility-+-benefits]}

Hi I’m Martin Chuck… 

And I’ve used this Accuracy Window you’re about to discover in over 50,000 lessons and 1,000 clinics... 

To help amateurs just like you eliminate slices, hooks, and other mis-hits... 

And hit fairway after fairway, consistently... 

So you can confidently play the best golf of your life.

## \[What It’s Not\] {#[what-it’s-not]}

Without changing your takeaway... 

Without adjusting your alignment... 

Without swinging slower... 

And definitely without EVER aiming straight at your target. 

Because the truth is…

At setup, if you’re aiming your clubface at the target… 

You need to have a perfectly aligned path AND clubface angle at impact…

Which leaves you ZERO margin for error. 

And NOT even the best pros can do THAT consistently. 

On the other hand... 

## \[Tesse Unique Mechanism \+ Benefits\] {#[tesse-unique-mechanism-+-benefits]}

Once you finally match up your club path and clubface WITHIN the Accuracy Window... 

You’ll have the MAXIMUM margin for error…

## \[Tease Mechanism\] {#[tease-mechanism]}

Because this Accuracy Window accounts for the natural deviations every player has in their swing.

As a result — your previously uncontrollable ball flight... 

Instantly turns into beautifully shaped, laser-accurate shots... 

That easily fly 25 yards farther...  

And land exactly where you want. 

## \[Proof\] {#[proof]-1}

Just like these players: 

\[AA-VSL-01: Show a quick before and after clip of a golfer. His before shots can be a 2 way miss, then show him flushing multiple draws in a row. 

Testimonial: *“Before working with Martin I had a pretty big 2 way miss, and my shots were all over the place. But now, my dispersion pattern was much tighter, and I hit 10 draws in a row\!”* 

NOTE: If we can let’s also show a dispersion chart before and after. The “before” chart showing balls scattered all over the course. The “after” showing his shots tightly placed near the target line.\] 

\[AA-VSL-04: Testimonial: *“I was always a little nervous my tee shot would be unplayable. But after the Accuracy Window Martin taught me today… I’m confident. I have margin for error. And because of that I know I can hit at least 12 fairways a round now. It’s amazing how easy it is”.*\]

So if you’re ready to eliminate at least 30 yards of dispersion off the tee… and instantly hit 12 or more fairways a round…

Then pay close attention. 

## 

## \[Objections\] {#[objections]}

Because it doesn’t matter if you’ve been playing for 10, 20, or even 30 years…

Or you’ve NEVER felt in control of your tee shots before. 

You’re about to see why you need to… 

STOP aiming at your target… STOP trying to hit straight shots…  

And instead spend just a few minutes dialing in YOUR Accuracy Window. 

## \[Future Pacing/Benefits\] {#[future-pacing/benefits]}

So the very next time you play... 

No matter how narrow the fairway is... 

How many hazards there are to the left or right…

Or even how many people are watching you tee it up on the first hole…

You’ll KNOW with 100% certainty… 

That you can aim at a small spot on the fairway… 

Swing within the Accuracy Window… 

And hit your target… 

Every. Single. Time.  

---

# **\[Both Leads Pick Up Here\]** {#[both-leads-pick-up-here]}

\[Tease Background Story/Unique Mechanism\]  
If that sounds good to you… 

Let me show you the Accuracy Window…

And why I’ve discovered that aiming straight at the target is the WORST thing you can do for your accuracy right now. 

# **\[Background Story\]** {#[background-story]}

## \[Credibility \+ Discovery Story\] {#[credibility-+-discovery-story]}

I know that sounds crazy, but stick with me here…

Because I’ve been running the Tour Striker Academy for over 10 years…

And that means I see A LOT of the same swing struggles each week. 

Look at what I mean — and watch closely because this is going to help you SEE the real root cause of your inaccuracy. 

\[AA-VSL-05: Let’s show a player with a good swing path hitting a slice. Use shot tracers to show their ball flight. NOTE: these players should have no super obvious swing flaws\]

This guy’s got a pretty good swing path, and yet his ball flight is still a nasty slice. 

Similarly, look at this guy... 

\[AA-VSL-06: Let’s get a different player, who also has a good swing and show him hooking the ball\]

He also has a consistent swing path, but he’s hitting pull hooks every time. 

And then this player? 

\[AA-VSL-07: Show a 3rd player pushing the ball right\]

Well, he appears to have a really solid swing… 

But he’s pushing it over 40 yards right of his target. 

What’s the ONE THING all these players have in common? 

I’ll put these videos side-by-side for you...

\[AA-VSL-08: show each of the 3 players swinging on screen at the same time\]

If you don’t see it by now…

They’re ALL aiming their clubface directly at the target at setup.  

\[AA-VSL-09: Let’s show a still image of all three players at setup and put big circles on screen around their clubface showing that it’s aimed at the target. We could add arrows / dotted lines to make it obvious they’re all aiming the same direction. NOTE: This would have to be a down the line image so the viewer can see the target. They won’t be able to see the clubface, but they will see where it’s aimed.\]

And that’s why I say... if you REALLY want to become a consistently accurate player…

The *first thing* you need to understand is the ROOT CAUSE of your inaccuracy right now... 

Which is... 

## \[Can’t aim at your target\] {#[can’t-aim-at-your-target]}

**AT SET UP, THE CLUBFACE CAN’T AIM AT THE TARGET.** 

That’s so important, I’ll say it again… 

The reason you or ANY golfer on the planet is struggling with accuracy is because in order to hit your target, the club can't aim at the target at set up. 

I know aiming at your target seems like the logical thing to do. 

And you’re probably wondering, “Well, if I don’t aim at my target, where on earth DO I aim?” 

So, let me walk you through it right now. 

## \[Explanation\] {#[explanation]}

As you probably know…

In your golf swing there’s two things that determine your ball flight:

The direction your club path is traveling in the downswing. 

![][image2]  
\[AA-VSL-10: Create a moving animation of a golf swing. With a red line that tracers a 0.0 club path directly down the target line. See the still image example above except ours will be with a driver and NO dotted line. The thick gray line would say “target line” the red would say “club path”. NOTE: This is just an example, don't use this image.\]

And…

Where the clubface is pointed at impact.

\[AA-VSL-11: Use the same animation from AA-VSL-10 with the path traveling down the target line. But pause the animation at impact and add a second blue arrow pointing directly at the target. Label this arrow “clubface angle” to show the clubface is also perfectly square to the path and target.\]

So if at set up, you’re aiming your clubface AT the target…

Then your path AND face ALSO need to be perfectly aligned with the target at impact. 

\[AA-VSL-12: Let’s use the same animation as AA-VSL-10 and pause at impact to emphasize the 0.0 path and 0.0 face angle matchup. Make it clear that both arrows are lined up perfectly in the same spot. To hit the ball straight\]

Meaning your face to path angle would need to be zero point zero. 

Or in other words, exactly matched up.

\[AA-VSL-13: Can use the same animation as AA-VSL-10, just add text that says “Face to Path \= 0.0”\]

This isn't repeatable... even for the BEST pros.

It leaves you with ZERO margin of error...

And NO "Accuracy Window" in your swing.

Because when you try aiming directly at the target...

Any tiny deviation from the perfect path OR the perfect face angle… will cause your ball flight to be totally unpredictable.

\[AA-VSL-14: use the same animation as AA-VSL-10, with a red arrow still tracing a perfect 0.0 path, but this time show the blue clubface arrow is OPEN at impact just 2.0 degrees. Show the club hitting the ball with this matchup and the ball slicing to the right. Let’s also add a text overlay that says “Face to Path \= 2.0 Open”\] 

This is why aiming straight at your target is so unreliable.

## \[Root Cause Metaphor\] {#[root-cause-metaphor]}

Think about it like walking a tightrope WITHOUT a balance pole... 

You have NO margin for error. 

Every step has to be PERFECT. 

And if you slow down… or make one tiny misstep to the left, OR the right… you’re done. 

The same thing happens when you try aiming directly at the target.

Even the slightest deviation in your club path and face angle at impact, and you will NOT hit your ball on a rope. 

## \[PROOF \- Controlling the face is too hard\] {#[proof---controlling-the-face-is-too-hard]}

And while ALL players have a repeatable club path…

Yes, all players — even you — have a repeatable path… 

No golfer has a consistent clubface at impact. 

And that's completely normal. 

It’s simply because the clubface is the hardest thing to control. 

And it makes aiming directly at your target... and hitting it consistently... almost impossible.

## 

Take this older golfer for example. 

\[AA-VSL-15: Let’s show an older golfer aiming his clubface at the target. Then use a tracer to show his club path is 0.0. Then show him hitting a slice. Time this up with the next couple lines\] 

## \[Proof \- aiming straight \- open clubface\] {#[proof---aiming-straight---open-clubface]}

At setup, he aims his clubface at the target… and even more importantly, during his downswing his path follows his target line perfectly… 

But yet, he still hits a slice. 

Why is that? 

Simple: because his clubface is open to that path just 2 degrees at impact. 

\[AA-VSL-16: use the same footage of the older golfer in AA-VSL-15, tracing the 0.0 club path. But briefly pause at impact and use an arrow to show that his clubface is open 2.0. Then show the ball slicing to the right with a shot tracer\] 

So even with his dialed in club path… he still slices, because of a tiny deviation in his clubface. 

## \[Proof \- aiming straight \- closed face\] {#[proof---aiming-straight---closed-face]}

On his next shot… He aims his clubface at the target before he starts his takeaway… 

But this time hits a pull hook…

Why?

Because he *closed* the clubface 2 degrees at impact to account for his right miss on the previous shot.   
   
\[AA-VSL-17: Get the same golfer as AA-VSL-15 to hit another shot, and use all the same animation elements from the previous example, showing the perfect 0.0 path. But pause at impact again and this time use an arrow to show that his clubface is closed 2.0. Use a shot tracer to show the ball hooking to the left\] 

## \[Proof \- aiming straight \- perfect face\] {#[proof---aiming-straight---perfect-face]}

Are you starting to see why aiming your clubface at the target is killing your accuracy? 

I hope so. 

Because until you understand that… NOTHING will ever change.

Now, I’m not saying that every once in a while, your path and face won’t match up PERFECTLY. 

And that’s when you hit a rare ‘unicorn’ straight ball. 

\[AA-VSL-18: Let’s show an animation of the perfect matchup where the club path is 0.0 and the face 0.0 at impact. Then show the ball flight straight towards the target\] 

But that’s not repeatable or predictable. Even for the best players on earth… 

Which is why it’s called a unicorn shot. 

\[Proof \-Straight Shot is Hard\]

Even Tiger Woods once said…

***The hardest shot to hit is a straight shot…***

\[Source: [Tiger Woods' Nine Windows | TaylorMade Golf](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=q0mj9Adz0Jw)\]

And if Tiger said that… Hopefully you see why aiming straight is NOT a reliable shot off the tee.


## \[Proof \- Swinging slower doesn’t work\] {#[proof---swinging-slower-doesn’t-work]}

Now, if you hear that and think…

**“Ok Martin, but if I just swing slower... it'll make it easier to get my path and face perfectly aligned with the target, right?”**

Nope.

That’s a mistake too… 

Because, you still need a perfect 0.0 face to path at impact. 

Any deviation and your ball will STILL fly AWAY from your target. 

\[Let’s show the ‘AA-VSL-13’ animation again here to reinforce that the ball flies away from the target with a tiny deviation in clubface angle. Use a red arrow tracing a perfect 0.0 path, but this time use a blue arrow to show the clubface open at impact just 2.0 degrees and the ball slicing to the right. Let’s also add a text overlay that says “Face to Path \= 2.0 Open”\] 

Just with a lot less distance.

Which can make your scores EVEN worse. 

\[PROOF \- Trackman Study\]

And trackman data proves this…

\[AA-VSL-19: We can show the graph from this trackman study: [https://blog.trackmangolf.com/golf-driving-performance/](https://blog.trackmangolf.com/golf-driving-performance/) Let’s remove the green line and write “distance drive” next to the red line and “accuracy drive” next to the blue lines. Would also be more clear if it was an “overhead” range view showing the ‘accuracy drive’ coming up shorter with text that highlights the accuracy drive has lower height, velocity, and total carry”. Time this up with the below lines\]  
![][image3]

In fact, a recent analysis found swinging slower only marginally increases accuracy…

But it COSTS you a whole lotta distance. 

Which means you take more shots to the green… 

And we both know that makes it impossible to score well. 

That means you have two choices. You can rely on luck to keep your ball in play. 

Or you can use what I know is the ONLY way to gain consistent accuracy… without needing a perfect swing.

The “Accuracy Window”...

#  {#heading}

# **\[Unique Mechanism \- Solution\]**

## \[Accuracy Window \- matches your clubface to your path\] {#[accuracy-window---matches-your-clubface-to-your-path]}

Here’s how it works…

Instead of aiming your clubface at the target… which as you now know, requires you to have a perfectly aligned face to path to hit it straight…

The Accuracy Window gives you margin for error…

And makes it easy to gently curve the ball *towards* your target and hit accurate shots on command. 

\[Let’s make sure we show an amateur hitting a tight draw here w/ shot tracer\]

Here’s what it looks like for someone who wants to work the ball left to right… 

## \[Accuracy Window \- FADE\] {#[accuracy-window---fade]}

![][image4]

Alright, so the red is your target line…

And the yellow line is your club path. 

\[AA-VSL-20: Let’s recreate the image above as an animation. A red line that represents the target line or the “0.0 line” label this “TARGET LINE”. Then a yellow line labeled “CLUB PATH” that represents the 3 degrees out to in club path. The space between the two lines should be filled in with white and we can even write in there “Accuracy Window”. Want to make it look like it’s very easy to have your clubface matchup to the path within that space  Time this up with the above and below lines.\]

In this example the club path is traveling from outside the target to inside 3 degrees. 

Now, see the white space BETWEEN the club path and the target?

THAT’S your Accuracy Window.  

As long as your clubface is ANYWHERE inside that window at impact…

\[AA-VSL-21: Create an animation of the club traveling down the 3.0 out to in path, pause at impact and clearly show the clubface is inside the Accuracy Window at impact to produce a fade. Use a shot tracer to show the ball flight starting left and gently fading back to the target line.\] 

The ball will gently fade back to your target line…. 

Without exception.  

Which is exactly what you want, because a gentle curve plays every hole. 

So even without a perfect swing and an out-to-in club path — the Accuracy Window gives you laser-like accuracy and a predictable ball flight…

So your ball ends up in the middle of the fairway. Every single time. 

## \[Accuracy Window  \- DRAW\] {#[accuracy-window---draw]}

Now let me show you how the Accuracy Window also works for hitting draws too…

Take a look… 

![][image5]

In this case the red is still your target line… the yellow is your club path... 

And the white space in between is your Accuracy Window.

But now the path is traveling in-to-out 3 degrees. 

\[AA-VSL-22: Create the inverse of the animation in AA-VSL-20 to show a draw producing path/face matchup… The 0.0 line will be red and labeled “TARGET LINE”. But now the yellow “CLUB PATH” line will travel from IN to OUT of that line 3 degrees. Fill the space between the target line and yellow in white with “ACCURACY WINDOW” text\]

You’ve still got all this margin for error. Because again, as long as your clubface is inside the Accuracy Window, you WILL draw the ball back to your target line. 

And hit fairway after fairway. 

\[AA-VSL-23: Create an animation of the club traversing the in to out path, and pause at impact to show the clubface closed to the path INSIDE the Accuracy Window at impact. Then show the ball drawing back to the target.\] 

## \[Accuracy Window Recap\] {#[accuracy-window-recap]}

The bottom line is…

As long as you’re inside the Accuracy Window… 

You’ll have more predictable ball flight… added distance… and a tighter dispersion pattern. 

And it doesn’t matter if you hit draws or fades… 

If you tend to miss right or left… 

Or if you have a totally unpredictable two-way miss with a TON of dispersion right now. 

Even if you’ve never thought about club path or clubface angle before today... 

All you need to know is…

The Accuracy Window accounts for the natural club path and clubface deviations in your current swing…

And gently curves the ball back to your target line…

WITHOUT having to aim straight at setup... or get lucky hitting a straight shot at your target. 

\[Show before and after clips of golfers hitting tightly controlled draws and fades with shot tracers\]

So how do you start reliably hitting tee shots inside this Accuracy Window?

Well after giving over 50,000 in-person lessons… and hosting over 1,000 golf academies...

I perfected an "Automatic Accuracy System" that easily and naturally gets your path and clubface in the Accuracy Window…

So you can dial in a consistent, predictable ball flight that hits 12 or more fairways a round… and flies 15 to 25 yards farther.

It's easy... 

Because this system gives you a PREDICTABLE margin for error... using your natural swing.

And it works fast... so you don't have to worry about spending weeks… months… or years banging balls aimlessly on the range.

How do I know?

I recently tested the Automatic Accuracy System in a live group lesson…

Where I lined up a dozen struggling amateur students…

\[AA-VSL-24: show b-roll of Martin instructing the amateurs\]

Players of all ages… with all different physicalities, swings, and handicaps.

\[AA-VSL-25: show b-roll of the amateurs warming up or hitting driver on the range\]

From beginners... 

To experienced golfers who’d been playing for decades without getting any better... 

And even some who had the driving yips so bad they refused to hit driver off the tee.

I had LESS THAN one hour to get them into the Accuracy Window... 

And no time to work with each student one-on-one...

So I showed the entire group the Automatic Accuracy System at the same time. 

\[AA-VSL-26: Group of golfers all looking at Martin as he teaches the Accuracy Window. We want to see multiple people on the range with him and IF POSSIBLE Tour Striker flags and banners that show the credibility of his academy in the background, similar to Haney. Want this to look very professional.\]

Check out what happened… 

## \[Problem 1: Slicer who refuses to hit driver\] {#[problem-1:-slicer-who-refuses-to-hit-driver]}

This guy’s been playing for over 20 years.

When he came to the group lesson… 

He was aiming directly at his target… and he wanted to hit the ball straight. 

\[AA-VSL-27: show b-roll of an amateur hitting driver shots that slice. Use shot tracers to show his left to right ball flight if needed\]

But his path was consistently over-the-top and his clubface was too open to the path for him to have a predictable ball flight. 

So he hit a LOT of slices. 

And if he somehow managed to keep his ball in play, he was way right of his target.  

But after using the Automatic Accuracy System for a couple minutes… that changed.

\[AA-VSL-28: Show a time lapsed b-roll on 2x speed where the golfer is doing the parallel to parallel swings from the drill\]

Because now his clubface is LOCKED *inside* the Accuracy Window… 

Producing a controlled, tight fade… that curves the ball BACK to his target…

Instead of constantly slicing away from it.

I mean... look at that ball flight. 

\[AA-VSL-29: Have the golfer hit 2-3 tight fades on 1.5x speed, then slow down the last shot to regular speed to emphasize the ball flight drawing back to the target\]

That’s accuracy if I’ve ever seen it. 

## \[Testimonials\] {#[testimonials]}

\[AA-VSL-30: Testimonial: “*I’ve been playing for years, and for as long as I can remember I haven’t hit driver off the tee, I just couldn’t keep it in play. But today, thanks to Martin’s Accuracy Window, I’m consistently hitting fairways on command.”\]*

## \[Problem 2: Hooking\] {#[problem-2:-hooking]}

Now, look at this next student's results. 

He’s been playing the game for most of his life.  And even though he had the coveted in-to-out club path you see on tour…

He was still aiming at his target, and trying to hit the ball straight.

Which isn’t repeatable or reliable… because his clubface was NOT inside the Accuracy Window. 

He would often miss LEFT of his target with unpredictable ball flight that was costing him multiple strokes every round.

\[AA-VSL-31: Have the golfer with in to out path hook a shot \- use shot tracer to show his ball flight if needed\]

But after using this Automatic Accuracy System that changed pretty quickly.

Because while his clubface wasn’t perfectly aligned with his club path… 

He was now swinging WITHIN the Accuracy Window. 

Look at the results on his dispersion chart…

\[AA-VSL-32: Show a 10-shot dispersion chart where he hit all draws\]

See how his ball flight has a very predictable draw pattern to it. 

That kind of accuracy and consistency will have him hitting 10 or more fairways a round.  

\[AA-VSL-33: **USE BOBBY DODGE *Testimonial****: My hooks were costing me at least 4 to 5 strokes per round… but after using what Martin showed me today, I was able to hit a fade without any effort.Thank you Martin\!\]*

So those were two experienced golfers… 

But how does the Automatic Accuracy System work for a student who just picked up the game last year?

## \[Problem 3: Two-Way Miss\] {#[problem-3:-two-way-miss]}

Despite working HARD at the range and taking at least a dozen in-person lessons…

This golfer still had a big two-way miss.

\[AA-VSL-34: **DONALD WRIGHT** Show the golfer with an in to out swing path hitting on the range. And use a shot tracer to show him missing right AND left\]

He’d slice one shot, then pull hook the next because his clubface wasn’t inside the Accuracy Window. 

That made it impossible for him to play well… and killed his confidence. 

After using the Automatic Accuracy System… 

He decided he wanted to consistently work the ball right to left…

Because his natural swing path was in-to-out.

This system quickly closed his clubface to the path… within the Accuracy Window…

And his shots started gently drawing back towards the target — just like he wanted.  

\[AA-VSL-35:  **DANIEL WRIGHT TESTIMONIAL** Show the player hitting a couple draws then show his Testimonial:  *“I wish this was the first lesson I took. This would have saved me a lot of time trying to figure out accuracy. Martin’s Automatic Accuracy System is hands down the easiest way to get predictable ball flight”*\]

And that’s just a few examples.

I’ve shown this Automatic Accuracy System to thousands of other golfers…

And it’s dialed in automatic accuracy for all of them... 

Taking them from erratic wild drives…

To flush, accurate shots down the center of the fairway.

And here’s the best news I’ve given you today…

Just like the students in this group lesson… 

After using the Automatic Accuracy System… 

You’ll ALSO be bombing your drives 15 to 25 yards farther than you ever have in your LIFE. 

Because once you're inside the Accuracy Window… you’ll have so much control over your ball flight… 

That you’ll stop losing distance to your big miss…  

\[AA-VSL-36: PROOF CLIP \- let’s show a side by side example of a golfer hitting a drive with an overlay that says “95 MPH club speed”. Add a shot tracer for both shots.  The shot on clearly left slices with an overlay that says 237 yards… the shot on the right draws and is 264 yards\]

And have complete confidence…

Knowing your ball is going to find fairway after fairway. 

Simply put \- the Accuracy Window is how you go from playing BAD golf... to GOOD or even GREAT golf, virtually overnight.

# **\[Delivery Mechanism \- Automatic Accuracy System\]** {#[delivery-mechanism---automatic-accuracy-system]}

## \[How it works\] {#[how-it-works]}

So by now, you have to be wondering how the *Automatic Accuracy System* works so quickly.  

I’ll walk you through it right here. 

## \[Auto Accuracy Pt 1: Parallel to Parallel\] {#[auto-accuracy-pt-1:-parallel-to-parallel]}

First, you'll use my “parallel to parallel ” sequence. 

\[AA-VSL-37: Show Martin teaching parallel to parallel drill from the course\]

After a couple practice swings… 

This sequence syncs your clubface to your natural swing path — inside the Accuracy Window… 

\[AA-VSL-38: Let’s show an animation where the clubface is clearly open to the path, and outside the accuracy window, then corrects and moves inside the accuracy window to hit a draw\]

Without having to overthink any part of your swing. 

If you want to play a fade, you can use this to hit a tight fade. 

\[Show a golfer hitting fade\]

And if you want to play a draw, you hit a draw. 

\[Show the same golfer hitting a draw\]

For you go-getters out there, you can easily use this sequence to play both a fade AND draw… it just takes a couple extra minutes. 

But I definitely recommend learning to hit controlled draws AND fades…

Because when you do… 

There’s no golf course on earth you can’t handle. 

And while that might sound impossible right now… you’ll see how easy it is thanks to the parallel to parallel sequence.

I’ve had golfers follow this who never hit a draw in their life — and they quickly started hitting beautifully shaped shots that draw back to the target line. 

And I’ve had other golfers who tended to hook the ball — who are now hitting tightly controlled fades. 

When this happens for the first time, the look on their face is priceless. 

\[AA-VSL-39: show a golfer hitting a draw and turning to the camera shaking his head in disbelief:  
“*Wow, I’ve never done that before\!”\]*

But the beauty of this step is just how simple it is. 

If you can swing a golf club you can do this parallel to parallel sequence... 

And immediately see for yourself what REAL accuracy looks like. 

Now, if you ONLY use this part of the system... 

You’ll see dramatic improvements in your ball flight… and you’ll be more accurate than most golfers you know.

That’s how quickly it works.

If you ask me, that’s already a HUGE win. 

But it’s important you don’t stop there…

Because the next step tightens your dispersion even more...

And gives you the consistency you’ve always wanted. 

## \[Auto Accuracy Pt 2: Accuracy Amplifier\] {#[auto-accuracy-pt-2:-accuracy-amplifier]}

I call it the “Accuracy Amplifier” — it’s kind of like the poor man’s launch monitor... 

\[AA-VSL-40: Show Martin demoing the Poor Man’s Launch Monitor to the group, and have him flush one with this setup as an example. The example will go well with the next couple lines\]

Because it gives you immediate feedback to easily tighten your Accuracy Window… 

And increase your ability to hit small targets… 

Without having a perfectly aligned path and face. 

The Accuracy Amplifier Drill is the secret weapon I give everyone who wants to master the Accuracy Window. 

Because unlike other accuracy drills that work on the range… but never transfer to the course… 

This uses positive visual reinforcement to make swinging in the Accuracy Window… AUTOMATIC.

\[AA-VSL-41: Show golfers doing the Accuracy Amplifier drill and admiring their ball flight.\]

And the best part is… 

Even when you’re NOT on the range… this Accuracy Amplifier makes it simple to recall the exact feel needed to deliver your clubface consistently within the Accuracy Window… 

So you hit predictable, reliable golf shots where it matters most — on the course. 

\[Show golfers bombing drives. Use shot tracers to show they’re landing on the fairway.\] 

So instead of focusing on a dozen confusing swing thoughts at once, while trying to hit the ball straight…

You’ll see the ball gently curve TOWARDS your target, naturally...

Giving you the control to place the ball wherever you want on the fairway... time and time again.

So if dialing in your accuracy and hitting more fairways sounds good to you…

Let me show you how you can start using this *Automatic Accuracy System* for yourself… *right now.*

# **\[Product Buildup \+ Reveal\]** {#[product-buildup-+-reveal]}

In the past... the only way to learn this system was to get 1-on-1 attention from me... 

Like major winners I’ve worked with — such as Darren Clarke or Mike Weir... 

Or to book a spot at one of my exclusive Tour Striker academies, which can have a waiting list of up to one year. 

But I realize not everyone is able to do that.

And because my mission is to help as many amateur golfers as possible go from playing embarrassingly bad golf... to confident, good golf... 

... something you can NEVER do if you’re not accurate... 

I partnered with Performance Golf, the industry leader in online golf instructional programs. 

They're well-known for producing high-end video training that not only looks good... but delivers results. 

So we took a professional film crew out to the Raven Golf Course here in Arizona… to capture all the details of my Automatic Accuracy System in high-quality HD video…

\[AA-VSL-42:Show a brief montage of Martin teaching from the course here\]

Capturing multiple camera angles, and slow-motion shots...

So you don’t miss a single detail.

These videos walk you through the Automatic Accuracy System… step by step. 

So you can use it to instantly sync your clubface… to your natural club path inside the Accuracy Window. 

\[AA-VSL-43: let’s insert a clip of Martin explaining the accuracy window from the course here\]

And that, as you now know… is the only way to tighten your dispersion pattern and play truly accurate golf on the course. 

And unlike other so-called accuracy solutions… that might make you more accurate during a lesson… or when you’re on the range…

But completely fall apart when you get on the course… 

Using the **Automatic Accuracy System** means you’ll never have to rely on hitting a straight ball ever again. 

After watching these videos, you’ll have more accuracy… more consistency… 

And more confidence than ever before… 

Knowing you can gently bend the ball towards your target, on command. 

# 

The **Automatic Accuracy System** has never been released publicly before...

And I’m confident it's going to change the game for you...

Even if you’ve NEVER been an accurate player in your entire golfing life. 

And I want YOU to be able to try it, right now… 

So you have an advantage over your golfing buddies… before word gets out. 

You deserve that for sticking with me today. 

That's why right here, right now, I'm giving you INSTANT online access to the **Automatic Accuracy System**...

## \[Lifetime Access\] {#[lifetime-access]}

So in less than a minute from now...

You can watch this exclusive video training... 

At your convenience... from any computer, smartphone, or tablet…

Anytime... as many times as you want…

Even while you're out on the range\!

It's like having me right there by your side... helping you dial in your dispersion. 

Actually scratch that, it’s better than having me right there...

Because I’m going to walk you through the ***Automatic** **Accuracy System***, step-by-step...

And I’ve covered every possible question you could have. 

Questions that we would NEVER have enough time to answer during an in-person lesson.

Because with the ***Automatic Accuracy System,*** I leave no stone unturned. 

You'll always have LIFETIME access to everything... and it's just a couple clicks away.

Feedback on these video lessons has already started pouring in…

And golfers are using the Automatic Accuracy System to become more accurate and consistent than ever before…

\[Martin pause\]

## 

## \[Testimonials\] {#[testimonials]-1}

\[AA-VSL-44: **USE GREG G Testimonial:** *I struggled to hit more than 3 fairways a round before using the  Automatic Accuracy System… and with Martin’s help I hit 13 fairways last round. Who knew at my age, I’d be playing the best golf of my life. \]*

\[AA-VSL-45: **USE KEVIN’S TESTIMONY**: *Before learning about the Accuracy Window from Martin I was never an accurate player and on my worst days I’d struggle to keep the ball in play… those penalty strokes add up fast. But now I’m hitting tight draws for the first time in my life, and further than ever. \]*

Pretty amazing, right?

Now, I could just give you the ***Automatic Accuracy System*** and send you on your way…

And in no time at all you’d be playing the most accurate golf of your life. 

But that’s not enough for me… 

I want you to reach your true potential as a golfer… 

So I'm adding some free bonus gifts when you get started today.

\[This will be the line that will connect to BOTH bonus sections, depending on the version we are creating\]

##    \[Bonus \#1: At-Home Accuracy\] {#[bonus-#1:-at-home-accuracy]}

First is the At-Home Accuracy Training Program… 

Because if you ever can’t make it to the range or course, like most players, you probably assume your accuracy will suffer. 

But that’s WRONG. 

Because I’ve designed a way for you to use the Automatic Accuracy System — without ever leaving the comfort of your own home. 

This bonus program includes simple drills and routines that require no balls to hit... minimal space... and can be done in minutes — from your living room, garage, office, or yard. 

\[AA-VSL-46: Show Martin teaching from at home training video 11 [https://app.iconik.io/asset/8fdf1626-763f-11ed-98b6-fa2762aff1bb](https://app.iconik.io/asset/8fdf1626-763f-11ed-98b6-fa2762aff1bb)\]

Just use what I teach you in this bonus and your time away from the course will make you more accurate than players who spend hours and hours at the range. 

And then, on your very next round, you’ll be extra confident knowing your accuracy is dialed and ready when it counts most. 

But honing your accuracy at home is only the beginning.

I’m also throwing in another extremely valuable bonus called… 

## \[Bonus \#2: Perfect Putting\] {#[bonus-#2:-perfect-putting]}

*Perfect Putting.* 

\[AA-VSL-47: Show Martin from indoor putting video 38: [https://app.iconik.io/asset/65f14cf6-5b48-11ed-988a-9e13156fe1dc](https://app.iconik.io/asset/65f14cf6-5b48-11ed-988a-9e13156fe1dc)\]

We both know that your short game  determines how well you score. 

But I don’t want you to have to spend hours on the practice green trying to dial in your putting stroke…

So I filmed a special bonus session where I show you a handful of simple putting tricks you can do around your house, in just minutes a week…

Without a putting green… a big practice area… or any fancy equipment at all.

This bonus training gives you the perfect arc and rhythm…

And makes your putting stroke consistent and automatic. 

\[AA-VSL-48: Show Martin from off-season putting video 33 \- want to show the 2 different videos so it doesn’t seem like we’re going to have them putting into coffee mugs: [https://app.iconik.io/asset/affb1a3a-59b7-11ed-9fb5-cae8f6b2ec0b](https://app.iconik.io/asset/affb1a3a-59b7-11ed-9fb5-cae8f6b2ec0b)\]

So the next time you’re on the course… and you're standing over a 6-foot birdie putt…

You won’t feel nervous or anxious that you’re gonna slide it by the hole. 

Instead you’ll KNOW your ball’s headed for the center of the cup. 

How cool would it be to finally average less than 30 putts a round?\!

Well that’s my goal for you…and the Perfect Putting video training makes it easy to shave strokes off your short-game. 

So I’m including this bonus totally FREE. 

And I’m still not done yet…

## \[Bonus \#3: Ball Striking Equipment Guide\] {#[bonus-#3:-ball-striking-equipment-guide]}

Because I want to save you a not-so-small fortune on equipment, too. 

Let’s be honest: there are so many confusing options on what golf gear to buy. 

And bad equipment can ruin your accuracy faster than just about anything. 

Mismatched clubs... unproven training aids... glitchy technology... it’s endless. 

The good news is... buying equipment that helps your accuracy and ball-striking... doesn’t have to be complicated... or expensive.

That’s why I created The Confidential Guide To Ball Striking Equipment. 

It’s based on years of research and surveys from members, who’ve helped us pick the BEST PERFORMING gear for amateurs. 

Want to know the right set of clubs for you? 

Or the best training aid to fix a specific problem with your game? 

Or even the right shoes... or swing technology tool... or anything else? 

It's all in here.

Not only will it help you avoid making bad purchases — which all by itself could save you thousands of dollars... 

The additional savings from coupons available within this guide exceeds $1,000. 

Which means this is literally worth WAY more than your entire investment in the program. 

But again, you won’t pay a single penny for The Confidential Guide To Ball Striking Equipment... because it’s yours, absolutely free when you join us today. 

And I’ve still got one more bonus for you…

## \[Bonus \#4- 14 Day Scratch Club Trial\] {#[bonus-#4--14-day-scratch-club-trial]}

**A free 14-day pass to our exclusive Scratch Club…**

***Scratch Club*** is your "All-Access Pass" to never-before-seen video training from some of the world's top golf instructors.

It's designed to drop strokes from your scorecard every month by accelerating your improvement in each key area of the game.

You'll be gaining insider-access to score-dropping secrets normally reserved for the most elite players in the world...

From high-level coaches like...

James Sieckmann... who's the \#1 ranked short game coach in the world according to Golf Digest...

Kevin Weeks... who's a top 3 ranked putting teacher in the world... 

Dr. Deborah Graham... who's one of the top 5 golf psychologists in the world, according to Golf Digest... 

She's trained more than 400 tour pros like Freddie Couples and Lee Janzen...

Nick Bradley… who worked with Justin Rose when he went from 125 to number 5 in the world golf rankings…

Plus was named “the most innovative golf instructor in the world” by Golf Digest.

You’ll also have access to Eric Cogorno... who’s given over 25,000 plus lessons and been featured in Forbes for his unique way of helping amateurs shave strokes from their scorecard.

All these great players and coaches are inside **Scratch Club**...

It’s insane... the best of the best, all in one place.  

You can think of it as "The Netflix Of Golf"... 

Just choose the part of your game you want to improve... and you'll find a clear step-by-step plan from some of the world's greatest teachers.

With this high-level training... ***Scratch Club*** members are seeing a 5-stroke reduction (on average) within the first 30 days alone.

## \[Testimonials\] {#[testimonials]-2}

\[Testimonial David Fleck  
“Within the past 2-4 weeks, I’m seeing a 5-7 shot improvement in my game...”\]

\[Testimonial Scott Barr  
[https://brixtonalbert.wistia.com/medias/60ckwwbwyz](https://brixtonalbert.wistia.com/medias/60ckwwbwyz)

Since joining the **Scratch Club**, I've improved with my accuracy... I've truly enjoyed hitting the ball better with better ball flight. I used to slice it, and now I find myself actually hitting more distance from hitting a better shot, as well as... my accuracy has improved as well.

2:39 \- 2:55  
I used to shoot in the high 80's... now I'm shooting more in the lower 80's... And the guys I'm playing with are more impressed with me now... and it's nice cause I get to win... and ya know, it's fun to have some money coming my way.\]

And you’ll love this part most... you get to take a full 14 days to see how incredible **Scratch Club** really is... 

If you love it, then do nothing and we’ll keep you on as a charter member for a discounted price of just….

$29 a month….

$39 a month…

Which will bill automatically.

You can cancel any time by emailing support@performancegolf.com.

And of course, no matter what you decide you'll keep lifetime access to the Automatic Accuracy System... 

Simply because I want you to be the most accurate player you know. 

So there you have it… 

## \[Bonus Value Recap\] {#[bonus-value-recap]}

Included in the Automatic Accuracy System, I’m also handing you...

***The At-Home Accuracy System… that improves your accuracy, from the comfort of your own home…***  

\[~~$197.00 value~~ FREE\]

# **\[Bonuses for Funnel With Straight Stick as Upsell\]** {#[bonuses-for-funnel-with-straight-stick-as-upsell]}

## \[Bonus \#1: Simple Speed System\] {#[bonus-#1:-simple-speed-system]}

    
I’m handing you the secret to ratchet up your swing speeds…

... so you can add 25 to 35 more yards off the tee...

I call this the Simple Speed System…

\[AA-VSL-49: Show Martin demoing a swing speed drill with his driver from Simple Speed System\]

And here’s the thing…

After using the Automatic Accuracy System your dispersion pattern will be so tight…

That I know you'll be chomping at the bit to release the brakes and really let it fly…

This series shows you exactly what to do on the range….  

So you increase your swing speeds… and get maximum distance with your driver…

WITHOUT swinging harder. 

And that’s why inside this **series**... I’ll show you ONE simple tweak you can make to your setup...

... that will automatically have you flushing the sweet spot…

And hitting up on the ball...

... sending your drives higher and farther than you’ve ever seen before. 

Hitting that first monster drive…while your buddies watch in amazement…

Is gonna feel awesome. 

Which is what I want for you. 

The Simple Speed System has over a dozen step-by-step training videos that walk you through EVERYTHING you need...

To increase your clubhead speed... 

Explode through the impact zone...

And add even more distance to your drives. 

It’s actually a full blown training series that sells for $197 on our website…

But since you’ve shown so much dedication to fixing your accuracy issues today...

And I want you to have everything you need to DOMINATE with your driver…. 

I'm adding in this special bonus FREE when you get started today. 

But honestly... I’m only just getting started...

Because like I said...

I’m fully committed to making sure that after today...

You have everything you need to end up playing the best golf of your life... and truly master your accuracy…  

That’s why I’m throwing in ANOTHER extremely valuable bonus...

## \[Bonus \#2- Approach Shot Accuracy\] {#[bonus-#2--approach-shot-accuracy]}

Called The Approach Shot Accuracy Series… 

Where I share how to dial in your precision with the next most important clubs in your bag... your hybrids and fairway woods.

So you can attack flags from 200 yards and in. 

Which is only going to help you lower your scores even more. 

In this mini-series I’ll show you how to use the same principles from the main Automatic Accuracy System…

To dial in your dispersion on your approach shots.

This will take your newfound accuracy to a whole ‘nother level... giving you the confidence of a player with total control of your game. 

But I’m not done yet… 

## \[Bonus \#3 \- Winning Wedges\] {#[bonus-#3---winning-wedges]}

I want you to have everything you need to lower your scores. 

That’s why I also filmed an entire video series to help you MASTER your short game. 

I call it “Winning Wedges”. 

I see SO many amateurs picking up unnecessary strokes from inside 50 yards… 

And I don’t want that for you. 

That terrible sinking feeling after a skulled pitch… watching that ball scream across the green with no hope of stopping…

A chunked chip that doesn’t go more than a couple yards… or leaving a ball in the bunker when you’re so close you could throw it into the hole…

All that ends TODAY. 

Because I’m also going to give you my winning wedges formula — this way you can capitalize on your long, straight drives… 

And ultimately lower your handicap. 

Bottom line… you’ll be throwing deadly accurate darts with your wedges. 

And you won’t pay a single penny for this training either. 

Because it’s yours, absolutely free when you join us today. 

And I’m not stopping there…I’ve still got one more bonus for you…

## \[Bonus \#4- 14 Day Scratch Club Trial\] {#[bonus-#4--14-day-scratch-club-trial]-1}

**A free 14-day pass to our exclusive scratch club…**

***Scratch Club*** is your "All-Access Pass" to never-before-seen video training from some of the world's top golf instructors.

It's designed to drop strokes from your scorecard every month by accelerating your improvement in each key area of the game.

You'll be gaining insider-access to score-dropping secrets normally reserved for the most elite players in the world...

From high-level coaches like...

James Sieckmann... who's the \#1 ranked short game coach in the world according to Golf Digest...

Kevin Weeks... who's a top 3 ranked putting teacher in the world... 

Dr. Deborah Graham... who's one of the top 5 golf psychologists in the world, according to Golf Digest... 

She's trained more than 400 tour pros like Freddie Couples and Lee Janzen...

Nick Bradley… who worked with Justin Rose when he went from 125 to number 5 in the world golf rankings…

Plus was named “the most innovative golf instructor in the world” by Golf Digest.

You’ll also have access to Eric Cogorno... who’s given over 25,000 plus lessons and been featured in Forbes for his unique way of helping amateurs shave strokes from their scorecard.

All these great players and coaches are inside **Scratch Club**...

It’s insane... the best of the best, all in one place.  

You can think of it as "The Netflix Of Golf"... 

Just choose the part of your game you want to improve... and you'll find a clear step-by-step plan from some of the world's greatest teachers.

With this high-level training... ***Scratch Club*** members are seeing a 5-stroke reduction (on average) within the first 30 days alone.

## \[Testimonials\] {#[testimonials]-3}

\[Testimonial David Fleck  
“Within the past 2-4 weeks, I’m seeing a 5-7 shot improvement in my game...”\]

\[Testimonial Scott Barr  
[https://brixtonalbert.wistia.com/medias/60ckwwbwyz](https://brixtonalbert.wistia.com/medias/60ckwwbwyz)  
[https://www.dropbox.com/s/edsxhirb1vh1kxl/Scott%20Barr%20RAW.MP4?dl=0](https://www.dropbox.com/s/edsxhirb1vh1kxl/Scott%20Barr%20RAW.MP4?dl=0) \- use this clip

0:18 \- 0:38  
Since joining the **Scratch Club**, I've improved with my accuracy... I've truly enjoyed hitting the ball better with better ball flight. I used to slice it, and now I find myself actually hitting more distance from hitting a better shot, as well as... my accuracy has improved as well.

2:39 \- 2:55  
I used to shoot in the high 80's... now I'm shooting more in the lower 80's... And the guys I'm playing with are more impressed with me now... and it's nice cause I get to win... and ya know, it's fun to have some money coming my way.\]

And you’ll love this part most... you get to take a full 14 days to see how incredible **Scratch Club** really is... 

If you love it, then do nothing and we’ll keep you on as a charter member for a discounted price of just….

$29 a month….

$39 a month…

Which will bill automatically.

You can cancel any time by emailing support@performancegolf.com.

And of course, no matter what you decide you'll keep lifetime access to the Automatic Accuracy System... 

Simply because I want you to be the most accurate player you know. 

So there you have it… 

## \[Bonus Value Recap\] {#[bonus-value-recap]-1}

Included in the Automatic Accuracy System… 

I’m also handing you...

***The Simple Speed System… t**hat increases your swing speeds… and gives you another 25 to 35 yards of distance off the tee…*

\[~~$197.00 value~~ FREE\]

***Approach Shot Accuracy…** So you’re a truly accurate player in total control of your hybrids and fairway woods…*

\[~~$197.00 value~~ FREE\]

***\[Delete the word “And” below in the version WITH Scratch Club\]***

***And Winning Wedges…** So you can stick it from anywhere inside 50 yards…*

\[~~$97.00 value~~ FREE\]

***And your all access pass to Scratch Club — which gives you the perfect plan to reach your desired handicap as fast as possible...*** 

\[~~$197.00 value~~ FREE\]

That’s $688 in REAL value that you’re getting absolutely FREE... 

That’s $491 in REAL value that you’re getting absolutely FREE... 

As soon as you invest in the **Automatic Accuracy System** today.

---

## \[BOTH BONUS SECTIONS PICK UP HERE\] {#[both-bonus-sections-pick-up-here]}

Given all that...

The only questions you probably have at this point are... 

1 \- How do I get started? 

And... 

2 \- How much is this going to cost? 

##  \[Price Justification\] {#[price-justification]}

Well, simply by watching this video you’ve already shown me you understand that accuracy is the key to good golf…

So I want to hand you the complete ***Automatic Accuracy System***… that gives you pinpoint accuracy...

Plus $688 in FREE bonuses…

Plus $491 in FREE bonuses...

For just one payment of $47.

of $57.

of $67.

of $97.

That’s over $150 OFF what The Automatic Accuracy System will sell for on our website…  
   
And it’s over $2,500 off what it would cost to learn this system from me in person at one of my academies…  

## \[CTA\] {#[cta]}

To get started and END your accuracy issues immediately... 

Simply click the button that's directly below this video.

## \[What happens when I order\] {#[what-happens-when-i-order]}

You'll then be taken to our secure checkout page trusted by over 300,000 happy customers where you'll enter your basic information.

It only takes about 30 seconds, and once you're done — you'll have instant access to the private members area, and the ***Automatic Accuracy*** **System**...

Plus all the bonuses.

Depending on what time of day it is for you...

You could watch the training today...

Head to the range this afternoon...

And immediately hit the most accurate golf shots of your life. 

And it won't just be once... you’ll hit shot after shot.... 

Perfectly flush... with *automatic* accuracy...

Why?

Because the **Automatic Accuracy System** matches your clubface… to your natural club path…inside your Accuracy Window.

Giving you bigger margin for error….

And predictable ball flight that gently curves back to your target line… 

With more distance than ever before… 

All without having to *pray* you hit a straight ball. 

## \[Guarantee reminder\] {#[guarantee-reminder]}

And if you’re still thinking...

***"What if this doesn't work for me?"***

Well, first of all, if that happens you’ll be a total outlier... 

Between private lessons and golf academies I’ve worked with over 75,000 amateurs at this point in my teaching career… 

And I've found this system works for ANYONE willing to take a couple minutes to try it out at the range… 

But if you're not completely blown away by the increased accuracy you're experiencing...

If your scores haven't dropped significantly…

And if you don't absolutely LOVE it...

Then you’re fully covered by my 365-Day, ***“Accuracy Guarantee”...***

PLUS, our unconditional refund policy.

So you can try it out completely risk free… and take up to an entire year to decide how much you like it. 

And if for ANY reason... or no reason at all... you're not completely satisfied...

All you have to do is send us an email any time within the next YEAR to support@performancegolf.com...

And our trained customer support staff will send you a refund for 100% of the amount you paid for the program.

But I don’t expect that to happen...

Because players are already using the Automatic Accuracy System to play the best, most consistent golf of their lives… 

## \[Testimonials\] {#[testimonials]-4}

\[AA-VSL-50: Before/After video playing and spliced with the below testimonial \- Before should show the player slicing a drive — then after shot have him flush it longer and straighter. 

**USE DOUG J Testimonial**: *“I’ve been playing for the last 25 years, and I’ve always battled a slice.  But today I hit 8 draws in a row that were all within a few feet of each other. Even my biggest misses will be on the fairway now… ”*\]

\[AA-VSL-51: Before/After video playing and spliced with the below testimonial \- Before should show player making poor contact being made, then after should have him flushing it longer and straighter 

**USE RUSS D Testimonial**: *“If I’m being honest… before today I would still get nervous on the first tee… but after using Martin’s Automatic Accuracy System I feel I’m in total control of my ball flight. I know where it’s going and I’m confident I can put the ball on the fairway. This is going to change everything for me.”*\]

## \[Urgency/Scarcity\] {#[urgency/scarcity]}

So if you want to be just like these golfers... then take advantage of this huge discount pricing, the 365-day no-risk money-back guarantee...

And act now.

Because I'm only offering this special discount pricing for a limited time.

If you come back to this presentation tomorrow, or next week, there's a very real chance you'll be asked to pay the full $197 listed on our main website.

## \[CTA\] {#[cta]-1}

Click the button below this video, and take advantage of this deal before it's too late.

Like I said before, and I’ll say once more... accuracy is EVERYTHING in golf. 

Because without the ability to predict where your ball is going to go, and stop… 

Nothing else matters... and the game will never be fun for you. 

You’ll always be playing from the toughest lies… in tree trouble… in the rough… in bunkers… near the cart path…or just flat out OB...

With too many lost balls to count. 

## 

So right now you have a decision to make that will have a permanent effect on your golf game...

Given that there’s zero risk to you... 

Doesn’t it make sense to at least *TRY* the Automatic Accuracy System? 

It’s already been proven in 1,000 plus academies — and it’s changed the golfing lives of thousands of happy students who I’ve worked with over the years...

Because when you invest in the Automatic Accuracy System… 

You’ll immediately go from wherever you are now...

To a respectably good... or even great golfer... who can put the ball on the fairway… 

And FINISH holes and entire rounds with scores you’re proud of. 

You’ll feel confident with groups that previously would have terrified you... 

And maybe even start taking money off those same ‘ringers’. 

You’ll be completely addicted to that sound of flush driver contact... and the pinpoint accuracy that comes with it. 

You’ll probably want to challenge yourself and see just how far you can pipe your drives…

Knowing you have more accuracy than you ever thought possible. 

## \[CTA\] {#[cta]-2}

So click the button below and complete the secure checkout page to get access to the entire training series, so you can use the **Automatic Accuracy System** for immediate results.

Watch the videos... head over to your driving range...  follow the steps...

And watch what happens next. 

I know you’re going to love it. 

## \[Future Pacing\] {#[future-pacing]}

You’re just a few shots away from the BEST most accurate golf of your life… 

Imagine teeing the ball up, picking your target…  and KNOWING the ball is going to land within feet or inches of that mark. 

It’d be a shame to let $47 dollars…

$57 dollars…

$67 dollars… 

$97 dollars… 

Stand in the way of that… 

And thanks to our one year, full money back guarantee… you’ve got NO risk. 

After today, there’s no more spinning your wheels... 

No more frustration… 

No more thinking this game is too hard... 

Instead you’ll be a golfer with complete control over your game. 

## \[CTA\] {#[cta]-3}

There are only 10 seconds left until this presentation ends.

Grab the ***Automatic Accuracy System*** now by clicking the button below this video...

And improve your accuracy for life. 

I’m Martin Chuck...

Thank you for watching...

And I can’t wait to hear your success story\!
